_metadata.description: ARAH Cobra, Dreadnok, Iron Grenadier, and Python Patrol vehicles from the original 3.75" A Real American Hero toyline (1982-1994). Includes all named villain faction vehicles, playsets, and repaints.

uncertain_items.name: Cobra Bunker
uncertain_items.reason: 1985 battle station — may be classified as a playset rather than a vehicle. Included for completeness.

uncertain_items.name: Cobra Surveillance Port
uncertain_items.reason: 1986 battle station — may be classified as a playset rather than a vehicle. Included for completeness.

uncertain_items.name: Dreadnok Air Assault
uncertain_items.reason: 1986 Sears exclusive repaint set — repackaged Joe vehicles (Skyhawk + VTOL) in Dreadnok colors. No figures included.

uncertain_items.name: Dreadnok Ground Assault
uncertain_items.reason: 1986 Sears exclusive repaint set — repackaged Joe vehicles (Stinger + RAM) in Dreadnok colors. No figures included.

uncertain_items.name: Cobra Machine Gun Nest
uncertain_items.reason: 1988 motorized action pack — borderline between accessory and vehicle.

uncertain_items.name: Cobra Twin Missile Radar
uncertain_items.reason: 1988 motorized action pack — borderline between accessory and vehicle.

characters.name: Cobra F.A.N.G.
characters.notes: F.A.N.G. (Fully Armed Negator Gyrocopter). Cobra's one-man aerial assault gyrocopter. First released 1983. Packaged with Viper Pilot (later called Cobra F.A.N.G. Pilot).

characters.name: Cobra H.I.S.S.
characters.notes: H.I.S.S. (High Speed Sentry). Cobra's signature battle tank. First released 1983. Packaged with H.I.S.S. Driver.

characters.name: Cobra S.N.A.K.E.
characters.notes: S.N.A.K.E. (System Neutralizer Armed with Kicking Energy). Cobra one-man armored battle suit. First released 1983. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra A.S.P.
characters.alt_mode: Assault system pod / twin cannon emplacement
characters.notes: A.S.P. (Assault System Pod). Motorized twin-cannon artillery platform. First released 1984. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra C.L.A.W.
characters.alt_mode: Covert light aerial weapon / hang glider
characters.notes: C.L.A.W. (Covert Light Aerial Weapon). Cobra one-man armed hang glider. First released 1984. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra Rattler
characters.notes: Cobra's primary ground-attack jet aircraft. Based loosely on the A-10 Thunderbolt II design. First released 1984. Packaged with Wild Weasel pilot.

characters.name: Cobra Stinger
characters.notes: Stinger (Night Attack 4-WD). Cobra's night-operations assault vehicle, a modified VAMP repaint in black. First released 1984. Packaged with Stinger Driver.

characters.name: Cobra Water Moccasin
characters.notes: Cobra's swamp assault airboat with rear-mounted fan propulsion. First released 1984. Packaged with Copperhead driver.

characters.name: Cobra Bunker
characters.notes: Cobra static defensive bunker with pop-up gun emplacements. Battle station. First released 1985. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra Ferret ATV
characters.notes: Small four-wheeled Cobra all-terrain reconnaissance vehicle. First released 1985. No packaged figure. Slug uses '-vehicle' suffix to avoid collision with existing 'ferret' character slug.

characters.name: Cobra Flight Pod
characters.alt_mode: One-man enclosed flight pod / Trouble Bubble
characters.notes: Also known as the 'Trouble Bubble'. Cobra's iconic one-man enclosed aerial attack pod. First released 1985. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra Moray Hydrofoil
characters.notes: Cobra's primary naval assault hydrofoil with twin torpedo launchers and machine guns. First released 1985. Packaged with Lamprey driver.

characters.name: Cobra Night Landing
characters.notes: Small inflatable Cobra assault raft for covert beach landings. First released 1985. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra Hydro-Sled
characters.notes: Small one-man Cobra aquatic assault sled. First released 1986. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra Night Raven S3P
characters.alt_mode: Supersonic spy plane with detachable drone
characters.notes: S³P (Surveillance, Stealth, Suppressive Platform). Cobra's high-altitude supersonic spy plane with detachable reconnaissance drone. One of the largest Cobra vehicles. First released 1986. Packaged with Strato-Viper pilot.

characters.name: Cobra Stun
characters.notes: Cobra's twin-cockpit split-wheeled attack vehicle with dual elevated gunner seats. First released 1986. Packaged with Motor-Viper driver.

characters.name: Cobra Surveillance Port
characters.notes: Cobra electronic surveillance and communications battle station. First released 1986. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra Terror Drome
characters.alt_mode: Fortress playset with Firebat launch pad
characters.notes: Cobra's massive fortress playset with integrated Firebat launch pad and defensive emplacements. One of the largest items in the ARAH line. First released 1986. Packaged with A.V.A.C. (Firebat pilot).

characters.name: Dreadnok Air Assault
characters.notes: Sears exclusive Dreadnok repaint set including a gyrocopter (Skyhawk repaint) and VTOL aircraft. First released 1986. No packaged figures.

characters.name: Dreadnok Ground Assault
characters.notes: Sears exclusive Dreadnok repaint set including a 4WD vehicle (Stinger repaint) and motorcycle (RAM repaint). First released 1986. No packaged figures.

characters.name: Dreadnok Swampfire
characters.notes: Dreadnok water-capable helicopter with pontoon floats. First released 1986. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Dreadnok Thunder Machine
characters.alt_mode: Heavily armed custom hot rod attack car
characters.notes: The Dreadnoks' signature vehicle — a heavily armed, ramshackle custom car bristling with weapons. First released 1986. Packaged with Thrasher driver.

characters.name: Dreadnok Air Skiff
characters.notes: Dreadnok turbine-powered aerial skiff armed with twin machine guns and missiles. First released 1987. Packaged with Zanzibar pilot.

characters.name: Cobra Buzz Boar
characters.notes: Small motorized Cobra tunneling/attack vehicle with rotating saw blade. First released 1987. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra Jet Pack
characters.notes: Small one-man Cobra personal flight jet pack. First released 1987. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra Maggot
characters.notes: Cobra's heavily armed multi-turreted battle tank with dual elevated gun pods. First released 1987. Packaged with W.O.R.M.S. driver.

characters.name: Cobra Mamba
characters.alt_mode: Supersonic attack helicopter with detachable pods
characters.notes: Cobra's large attack helicopter with two detachable flight pods. First released 1987. Packaged with Gyro-Viper pilot.

characters.name: Cobra Pogo Ballistic Battle Ball
characters.notes: Cobra's one-man ball-shaped ballistic assault vehicle that hops using pogo mechanism. First released 1987. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra Sea Ray
characters.alt_mode: Underwater attack and aerial recon vehicle
characters.notes: Cobra's dual-purpose underwater/aerial assault vehicle with surface-to-air missiles and turbojet engine. First released 1987. Packaged with Sea Slug driver.

characters.name: Cobra W.O.L.F.
characters.notes: W.O.L.F. (Winter Operational Light Fighting vehicle). Cobra's tracked arctic assault vehicle. First released 1987. Packaged with Ice Viper driver.

characters.name: Dreadnok Cycle
characters.notes: Dreadnok armed motorcycle with missiles and exhaust pipes. First released 1987. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra Adder
characters.notes: Cobra twin-engine fan-powered attack hovercraft. First released 1988. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra Battle Barge
characters.notes: Cobra small armed assault raft / pontoon boat. First released 1988. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra B.U.G.G.
characters.alt_mode: Amphibious command vehicle with detachable sub
characters.notes: B.U.G.G. (Battle Utility Gear Glider). Cobra amphibious command vehicle with removable two-man hovercraft/submarine. First released 1988. Packaged with Secto-Viper driver.

characters.name: Cobra Imp
characters.notes: Small Cobra motorized assault vehicle. First released 1988. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra Stellar Stiletto
characters.notes: Cobra's space-capable attack fighter jet. First released 1988. Packaged with Star-Viper pilot.

characters.name: Cobra Gyrocopter
characters.notes: Small Cobra motorized vehicle pack gyrocopter. First released 1988. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra Rocket Sled
characters.notes: Small Cobra motorized vehicle pack rocket sled. First released 1988. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra Machine Gun Nest
characters.notes: Cobra motorized action pack machine gun emplacement. First released 1988. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra Twin Missile Radar
characters.alt_mode: Motorized twin missile launcher with radar
characters.notes: Cobra motorized action pack twin missile launcher with radar dish. First released 1988. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Dreadnok Battle Axe
characters.notes: Dreadnok motorized action pack three-wheeled attack motorcycle. First released 1988. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Destro's Despoiler
characters.notes: Iron Grenadiers attack helicopter with detachable ground vehicle. Destro's personal command vehicle. First released 1988. Packaged with Destro (v2) driver.

characters.name: D.E.M.O.N.
characters.notes: D.E.M.O.N. (Dual Elevating Multi-Ordnance Neutralizer). Iron Grenadiers heavy assault tank. First released 1988. Packaged with Ferret driver. Note: 'ferret' character slug is the IG DEMON driver, distinct from the 'ferret-vehicle' Cobra ATV.

characters.name: Iron Grenadiers A.G.P.
characters.notes: A.G.P. (Anti-Gravity Pod). Iron Grenadiers one-man anti-gravity flight vehicle. First released 1988. Packaged with Nullifier pilot.

characters.name: Cobra Condor Z25
characters.alt_mode: Modular attack jet with detachable bomber wing
characters.notes: Cobra's large modular attack aircraft with detachable bomber wing and high-speed fuselage. Features bomb-bay doors and retractable landing gear. First released 1989. Packaged with Aero-Viper pilot.

characters.name: Cobra F.A.N.G. II
characters.notes: Updated version of the original F.A.N.G. gyrocopter with improved design. First released 1989. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra H.I.S.S. II
characters.notes: Updated and redesigned version of the original H.I.S.S. tank. First released 1989. Packaged with Track Viper driver.

characters.name: Darklon's Evader
characters.notes: Iron Grenadiers fast-attack ground vehicle. Darklon's personal vehicle. First released 1989. Packaged with Darklon driver.

characters.name: Destro's Razorback
characters.notes: Iron Grenadiers heavy assault tank. First released 1989. Packaged with Wild Boar driver.

characters.name: Python Patrol A.S.P.
characters.alt_mode: Python Patrol repaint assault system pod
characters.notes: Python Patrol repaint of the 1984 Cobra A.S.P. in red and black python-pattern camouflage. First released 1989. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Python Patrol Conquest
characters.notes: Python Patrol repaint of the 1986 G.I. Joe Conquest X-30 in red and black python-pattern camouflage. First released 1989. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Python Patrol Stun
characters.alt_mode: Python Patrol repaint twin-cockpit attack vehicle
characters.notes: Python Patrol repaint of the 1986 Cobra Stun in red and black python-pattern camouflage. First released 1989. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra Hammerhead
characters.alt_mode: Underwater command vessel with detachable attack subs
characters.notes: Cobra underwater command vehicle with two detachable attack submarines, decompression chamber, and pivoting radar. First released 1990. Packaged with Decimator driver.

characters.name: Cobra Piranha
characters.notes: Cobra assault speedboat with surface-skimming missiles and depth charge launcher. First released 1990. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra Rage
characters.alt_mode: Urban assault tank with mine dispenser
characters.notes: Cobra urban assault tank with mine dispenser and heavy weaponry. First released 1990. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Overlord's Dictator
characters.alt_mode: Attack tank/hovercraft with detachable jet pod
characters.notes: Iron Grenadiers attack tank/hovercraft with detachable flying jet pod. Two vehicles in one. First released 1990. Packaged with Overlord figure.

characters.name: Destro's Dominator
characters.alt_mode: Tank that converts to gunship helicopter
characters.notes: Iron Grenadiers vehicle that transforms from tank mode to helicopter gunship mode. First released 1990. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra Ice Sabre
characters.notes: Cobra front-line arctic assault carrier with rotating 3-man cockpit, anti-aircraft cannons, and swinging missile launcher. First released 1991. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra Paralyzer
characters.notes: Cobra fast attack vehicle with advanced track tread technology, swiveling battle turret, and double-barreled concussion cannon. First released 1991. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra Septic Tank
characters.notes: Cobra Eco-Warriors anti-environmental assault tank with water-shooting sludge cannon and color-change battle damage feature. First released 1991. No packaged figure. Sludge-Viper sold separately in the Eco-Warriors sub-line.

characters.name: Cobra Battle Copter (Interrogator)
characters.notes: Cobra Battle Copter with pull-string powered rotors for actual flight capability. First released 1991. Packaged with Interrogator pilot.

characters.name: Cobra Air Commandos Glider (Sky Creeper)
characters.notes: Air Commandos Cobra glider. Part of the Air Commandos series with pull-string launchers. First released 1991. Packaged with Sky Creeper pilot.

characters.name: Cobra Air Commandos Glider (Night Vulture)
characters.notes: Air Commandos Cobra glider for covert insertion and recon. Part of the Air Commandos series. First released 1991. Packaged with Night Vulture trooper.

characters.name: Cobra Barracuda
characters.notes: Cobra attack submarine with torpedo launchers, movable stabilizer fins, and real diving action via baking soda tablets. First released 1992. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra Earthquake
characters.notes: Cobra large construction/combat vehicle with earth-moving capabilities and heavy weapons. First released 1992. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra Liquidator
characters.notes: Cobra Liquidator A.T.F. (Advanced Tactical Fighter). One-piece water-shooting jet with four missiles. First released 1992. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra Parasite
characters.alt_mode: Armored personnel carrier with bomb catapult
characters.notes: Cobra armored personnel carrier with bomb-firing catapult, rotating laser chin gun, and capacity for up to 17 figures. First released 1992. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra Battle Copter (Heli-Viper)
characters.notes: Cobra Battle Copter with pull-string flight mechanism. First released 1992. Packaged with Heli-Viper pilot. Distinct from the 1991 Interrogator version.

characters.name: Cobra Detonator
characters.notes: Cobra's large ICBM missile launcher vehicle with six monster tires, three long-range ICBM rockets, and targeting seat. Part of Battle Corps series. First released 1993. Packaged with Nitro-Viper driver.

characters.name: Cobra Ice Snake
characters.notes: Cobra fast-attack arctic vehicle with spring-action 360-degree rotating missile launcher, roll-cage canopy, and heavy duty treads. Part of Battle Corps series. First released 1993. No packaged figure.

characters.name: Cobra Scorpion
characters.notes: Cobra desert attack vehicle with 360-degree rotating missile launcher, pivoting Gatling gun, and fuel-injected V8 engine. Part of Battle Corps series. First released 1994. No packaged figure.
